body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

body.title: Challenges and Opportunities in Management for Green Networking
Data Collection Requirements and Technologies for Digital Twin Network
Challenges and Opportunities in Green Networking - draft-irtf-nmrg-green-ps-00
NMRG Session 1 Introduction and NDT topic
Data Management Paradigms: Data Fabric and Data Mesh
